creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
# pkg info -xo xdm
xdm-1.1.11: x11/xdm
#

# pkg info -xl xdm
xdm-1.1.11 owns the following files:
/usr/local/bin/xdm
/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/authdir
/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/chooser
/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/libXdmGreet.la
/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/libXdmGreet.so
/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/pixmaps/xorg-bw.xpm
/usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/pixmaps/xorg.xpm
/usr/local/man/man1/xdm.1.gz
/usr/local/share/X11/app-defaults/Chooser
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/GiveConsole
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/TakeConsole
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xaccess
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xreset
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xresources
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xservers
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xsession
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xsetup_0
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xstartup
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/Xwilling
/usr/local/share/examples/xdm/xdm-config
/usr/local/share/licenses/xdm-1.1.11/LICENSE
/usr/local/share/licenses/xdm-1.1.11/MIT
/usr/local/share/licenses/xdm-1.1.11/catalog.mk

#

However,

# ls -al /usr/local/lib/X11/xdm/
total 118
drwxr-xr-x   3 root  wheel    512 Jul 11 23:53 .
drwxr-xr-x  11 root  wheel    512 Jul 11 23:52 ..
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    325 Jul 11 23:53 GiveConsole
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    184 Jul 11 23:53 TakeConsole
-r--r--r--   1 root  wheel   3401 Jul 11 23:53 Xaccess
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    193 Jul 11 23:53 Xreset
-r--r--r--   1 root  wheel   2723 Jul 11 23:53 Xresources
-r--r--r--   1 root  wheel    429 Jul 11 23:53 Xservers
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    875 Jul 11 23:53 Xsession
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel     88 Jul 11 23:53 Xsetup_0
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    196 Jul 11 23:53 Xstartup
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel    291 Jul 11 23:53 Xwilling
lrwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel     20 Jul 11 23:53 authdir -> /var/lib/xdm/authdir
-r-xr-xr-x   1 root  wheel  20568 Jul 11 23:52 chooser
-rwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel   1471 Jul 11 23:52 libXdmGreet.la
-rwxr-xr-x   1 root  wheel  62079 Jul 11 23:52 libXdmGreet.so
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel    512 Jul 11 23:52 pixmaps
-r--r--r--   1 root  wheel   1346 Jul 11 23:53 xdm-config
#

It seems the first 10 files from this directory,
from GiveConsole to Xwilling, do not appear
in pkg info -xl output.

I'm having quite a few problems with xdm
on amd64 right now, so wanted to make sure
my installation is fine. Hence this report.
